item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 3min Neil Robertson has told me who he thinks deserves to be favourite for the World Snoo
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 3min Neil Robertson has told me who he thinks deserves to be favourite for the World Snooker Championship.
There's plenty from Robertson in my World Championship Interview with the 2010 Crucible winner.
Coming to @SLSport_ soon.
#Snooker 32

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 6min “You’ve been incredibly good for the sport. I just hope he doesn’t throw it away and it going t
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 6min “You’ve been incredibly good for the sport. I just hope he doesn’t throw it away and it going too far. I don’t want it to spiral out of control.”
Luke Littler’s WWE pantomime style on stage could provoke more boos as concerns grow.
Full story: https:// oche180.com/littler-warned -over-wwe-style-stage-approach/ … Mostrar más 83

item.title:
MSSdarts: Chris Murphy reposteó MODUS Super Series @MSSdarts · 1h “I’m very competitive. I want to win everything.”
Steve Beato
item.description:
Chris Murphy reposteó MODUS Super Series @MSSdarts · 1h “I’m very competitive. I want to win everything.”
Steve Beaton has unfinished business as he teams up with Fallon Sherrock for International Pairs 3.
Watch LIVE and FREE on Pluto TV from 20th April 1 5 443

item.title:

item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 13min 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗙𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗹 - 𝗡𝗶𝗷𝗺𝗮𝗻 𝘃𝘀 𝗪𝗮𝗶𝘁𝗲𝘀
Wessel Nijman is into his fourth Players Championship final of the season as he hunts his third title on the floor.
He'll face former Grand Slam champion Scott Waites who has reached his first Pro Tour final.
Will we see a Mostrar más 110
